name: Rabbit Cake (Hasen Kucka)
recipeInstructions:
1. Use broth in which the rabbit is cooked. The recipe did not specify, but I assume that the rabbit should be boiled.
2. Cook the rabbit until tender. Separate the meat from the bones and cut into small pieces.
3. Butter a casserole dish and place a layer of potato filling at the bottom.
4. Add a layer of rabbit meat on top of the potato filling.
5. Mix 1 tablespoon of sauce (made by combining flour and water) with salt and pepper, then add to the dish.
6. Continue layering until the dish is filled.
7. Bake at 350°F until brown, about 25 minutes.
